body:
## Context

Profile, feature, test, claim, and evidence rows each carry status fields used by release guards and operator review.
Before this change, these statuses were advanced by separate manual updates or by release-specific transitions, leaving routine registry health drift possible.

## Decision

Add an explicit automated status synchronization operation that derives statuses for profiles, features, tests, claims, and evidence from the registry graph and local artifact paths.
The operation must be auditable, idempotent, and available as a dry run before persisting changes.

## Consequences

Operators can run one command to align status fields before boundary freeze and release certification.
Release publication transitions remain distinct; automated sync does not replace release certification, promotion, or publication guards.

status_notes.note: Accepted with automated status sync implementation

summary: Profile, feature, test, claim, and evidence rows each carry status fields used by release guards and operator review.
title: Automated registry status synchronization
